properties.effects: Euphoria, increased energy/alertness, decreased need for sleep, increased sociability, mood lift, increased libido, excessive talking, decreased appetite, weight loss, sweating, disturbed sleep patterns, bruxism, visual and auditory hallucinations, itchiness, aggressiveness, moodiness.
properties.summary: This summary is written based on few sources: The cathinone analogue of 4-CMA, which is highly neurotoxic. It is not known if the cathinone family holds the same neurotoxicity concern as with the parent compound.
